package rulecoverage

func PositiveBcryptCostTooLow() string {
    ruleID := "bcrypt_cost_too_low"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`bcrypt.GenerateFromPassword(pw, cost)` where `cost` is literally `< 10` or `bcrypt.MinCost`"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
